name: HireRight Background Screening REST API
what_it_does: HireRight background screening REST API for employers, staffing firms, and HR technology platforms to order and retrieve employment background checks — including criminal history, employment verification, education verification, drug testing, MVR, credit checks, international screening, and I-9 employment eligibility verification — enabling automated applicant screening workflows, background check order management, and compliance reporting through HireRight's enterprise employment screening platform. Enables AI agents to manage order management for background check package order creation and submission automation, handle candidate management for applicant invitation and consent collection automation, access report management for background check result and report retrieval automation, retrieve status management for order status and progress tracking automation, manage package management for screening package configuration automation, handle adverse action for FCRA-compliant adverse action notification automation, access international screening for global background check and education verification automation, retrieve drug test for collection site scheduling and drug test result automation, manage I-9 management for Form I-9 and E-Verify workflow automation, and integrate HireRight with ATS, HRIS, and onboarding platforms for automated employment screening.
use_cases: Automating background check orders from ATS during the hiring workflow for HR automation agents
Retrieving and evaluating background check results for pre-employment screening automation agents
Managing I-9 employment eligibility and E-Verify workflows for HR compliance automation agents
Running international background checks for global hiring operations automation agents
not_for: Consumer self-background checks (HireRight is employer-initiated employment screening, not consumer self-service)
Ongoing continuous background monitoring beyond initial hire (HireRight is primarily pre-employment; continuous monitoring is a separate service)
Tenant screening and real estate (HireRight is employment-focused; dedicated tenant screening platforms serve real estate)
best_when: An employer, staffing firm, or HR technology platform wanting AI agents to automate background check order placement, status monitoring, and result retrieval through HireRight's enterprise employment screening platform.
avoid_when: FCRA COMPLIANCE IS NON-NEGOTIABLE: Background check usage is strictly regulated by FCRA (Fair Credit Reporting Act); automated uncompliant assumption creates legal_liability for automated adverse action decisions without FCRA-required disclosure, authorization, and notice; automated must implement FCRA-compliant workflows. CANDIDATE CONSENT IS REQUIRED: HireRight cannot initiate a background check without candidate's signed consent; automated auto-consent assumption creates unauthorized_screening for checks ordered without obtaining proper consent; automated must collect and record candidate consent before ordering. STATE LAWS VARY SIGNIFICANTLY: State laws on criminal record use (ban-the-box, lookback periods) vary by jurisdiction; automated uniform-screening assumption creates employment_discrimination_risk for screening without state-specific compliance rules; automated must implement jurisdiction-specific screening compliance. INTEGRATED ATS PARTNERSHIP MAY BE REQUIRED: HireRight offers certified integrations with major ATS (Workday, Taleo, Greenhouse); automated standalone assumption creates duplicate_data_entry for customers using an ATS without HireRight integration; automated should leverage ATS integration for seamless workflow.

auth.notes: HireRight uses OAuth2 for Background Screening REST API. REST API with JSON. Nashville, TN HQ. Founded 1981. Acquired by General Atlantic 2018 ($1.6B). Products: Criminal background checks, employment verification, education verification, MVR, drug testing, I-9/E-Verify, international screening. 40,000+ customers. 200+ countries coverage. Industries: staffing, retail, healthcare, financial services. Competes with Checkr, Sterling, and First Advantage for employment background screening.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public trial; production requires HireRight account setup (free to create); pay-per-check
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-check pricing by screening type; volume discounts; enterprise account pricing; packages from $15-$200+ per check
pricing.notes: Nashville TN. General Atlantic backed. 40,000+ customers. 200+ countries. Pay-per-check. Employment screening leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; background check order APIs throttled per account tier

known_agent_gotchas: BACKGROUND CHECKS ARE ASYNC: Background check completion takes hours to days; automated instant-result assumption creates empty_result for status checks immediately after ordering; automated must implement webhook or polling to detect report completion

FCRA ADVERSE ACTION REQUIRES SPECIFIC STEPS: Taking adverse employment action based on background check requires FCRA pre-adverse and adverse action notices; automated skip-notice assumption creates FCRA_violation for adverse decisions without required notices; automated must implement FCRA-compliant adverse action workflow

CONSENT IS LEGALLY REQUIRED BEFORE ORDERING: Background check must not be ordered before candidate provides written authorization; automated order-first assumption creates unauthorized_screen for orders placed before consent is collected; automated must verify consent collection before order creation

REPORT STATUS HAS MULTIPLE STAGES: Reports progress through Pending → In Progress → Complete stages; automated binary-status assumption creates premature_evaluation for reports checked before all checks within the order are complete; automated must check order-level completion, not just individual checks

INTERNATIONAL CHECKS HAVE LONGER TAT: International background checks may take 5-15+ business days; automated domestic-turnaround assumption creates missed_start_date for global hires expecting same-day results; automated must set appropriate timelines for international screening
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employment screening. FCRA, GDPR, CCPA, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Candidate PII, criminal history, and employment history.

security_score_components.security_notes: Background screening. FCRA, GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Candidate PII and background check data.
